summary: Backend refactoring test completed successfully. All 20 backend API tests passed after server.py was split into 17 modular router files. Frontend login, dashboard, products (with IVA column), and video tutorials pages all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring completed successfully - server.py reduced from ~2843 lines to 28 lines
All 17 router modules (auth, stores, warehouses, suppliers, customers, categories, products, inventory, purchases, sales, shop, reports, settings, employees, tenants, crm, misc) properly integrated
All API endpoints respond correctly after refactoring

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, products with IVA, videos all verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified. All routes work via modular router architecture. Key endpoints tested: auth/login, products, stores, categories, warehouses, customers, sales-orders, employees, videos, audit-logs, settings/system, reports/tax, dashboard/stats, tenants, suppliers, purchase-orders, inventory, transfer-logs

frontend_pages_working: Login page - Credentials work, redirects to dashboard
Dashboard - Stats displayed ($0.00 sales, 10 products, 4 pending orders)
Products page - IVA column visible (16% values), 10 products in table
